descriptions: Commerce Guild imposes trade embargo on Union raw materials
Guild Board suspends import licenses for unprocessed ore
flavor_texts: Dock workers whisper about empty cargo holds and angry captains.
The commodity boards flash red  -- entire ore categories reading SUSPENDED.

descriptions: Science Collective restricts tech exports citing patent enforcement
Collective Council suspends technology licensing agreements
flavor_texts: Lab corridors buzz with urgent memos about intellectual property quarantine.
Export manifests pile up, unsigned. The licensing office has gone dark.

descriptions: Miners Union halts ore exports in protest of Guild tariff hike
Union Workers' Council votes to suspend outbound ore shipments
flavor_texts: The loading bays are quiet. Crates of ore sit sealed, going nowhere.
Picket signs appear near the cargo terminals. 'Our Rock, Our Terms.'

descriptions: Frontier Alliance suspends food exports amid political crisis
Alliance community councils vote to withhold agricultural shipments
flavor_texts: The harvest markets stand half-empty. What's left isn't for sale  -- not to outsiders.
Farmers shake their heads at the loading docks. 'Feed our own first,' they say.

descriptions: Commerce Guild Annual Trade Fair opens at {system}
The Grand Exchange hosts its quarterly luxury auction
flavor_texts: The Central Exchange gleams under event lighting. Even the air smells expensive.
Bid paddles flash as rare antiquities cross the block. Credits flow like water.

descriptions: Founders' Day celebrations fill Breakstone with song and firelight
The anniversary of the First Strike  -- Breakstone remembers Sora Takahashi
flavor_texts: Mining shanties echo through the corridors. Even the machinery seems to keep time.
Someone has painted fresh murals in Cargo Bay 7. The old stories, retold in new colors.

descriptions: Science Collective hosts annual research symposium at {system}
Okafor Institute opens its doors for the Biennial Knowledge Exchange
flavor_texts: Researchers in color-coded lab coats crowd every corridor, debating in technical shorthand.
Poster sessions line the atrium. The smell of synthesized coffee is overwhelming.

descriptions: Alliance Harvest Festival draws communities together at {system}
The annual gathering  -- stories, food, and fellowship under open sky
flavor_texts: Long tables stretch through the commons, heavy with food nobody's charging for.
A storyteller holds a circle of children rapt. The grown-ups are listening too.

descriptions: Workers walk off the job at Breakstone  -- Union leadership calls for solidarity
Mining operations halt as workers demand revised safety protocols
flavor_texts: The drills are silent. The silence is louder than any machine.
Picket lines form at every cargo bay. 'We Built This' banners stretch between support columns.

descriptions: Forgeworks fabricators down tools over working conditions
Manufacturing halt at Forgeworks as workers demand fair profit-sharing
flavor_texts: The foundries go dark for the first time in years. The station feels wrong without the vibration.
Work crews gather in the mess, comparing notes on Guild executive compensation. The mood is grim.

descriptions: DCMC workers stage walkout at Iron Depths over safety violations
Deep-core extraction halts as miners refuse to enter contested shafts
flavor_texts: Core Station's normally busy corridors feel abandoned. Even the corporate managers look nervous.
Someone's chalked 'SORA WAS RIGHT' on the bulkhead near Shaft 12.

descriptions: Collective announces breakthrough in applied medical synthesis
Okafor Institute publishes landmark results  -- medical supplies surge
flavor_texts: The medical wing buzzes with activity. Researchers shake hands, grinning. Something big happened.
Supply manifests show triple the usual outbound medical shipments. The patents, for once, are open.

descriptions: Nova Applied Sciences publishes materials science advance
New manufacturing process slashes electronics production costs
flavor_texts: Nova's usually secretive corridors are almost festive. Someone's actually smiling in the patent office.
The price boards update in real time. Electronics are dropping. Everyone's trying to figure out why.

descriptions: Energy efficiency discovery makes fuel cells dramatically cheaper
Collective publishes open-source reactor improvement specs
flavor_texts: Engineers crowd the technical library, downloading the new reactor specs. The fuel depot is practically giving it away.
For once, the Collective shares freely. The Engineering department is suspicious but grateful.

descriptions: Pirate activity surges near the Frontier  -- convoy losses mounting
Armed raiders spotted in increasing numbers along Alliance shipping lanes
flavor_texts: Captains swap stories at the bar. Nobody's laughing.
The salvage markets are flush with debris. That's never a good sign.

descriptions: Pirate attacks escalate along the Nexus-Forgeworks corridor
Trade convoys report coordinated raids on primary shipping lanes
flavor_texts: Insurance premiums have tripled overnight. The Guild brokers aren't hiding their worry.
Armed escorts are booked solid. Independent haulers are on their own.

descriptions: Organized raider fleet strikes deep space installations
Remote systems report unprecedented pirate coordination
flavor_texts: DCMC security is on high alert. The heavy guns are manned for the first time in months.
Nova's already-tight security has gone to lockdown. Visitors get three IDs checked and a pat-down.

descriptions: Ore shortage at Forgeworks  -- Breakstone strike cuts off raw material supply
Manufacturing slowdown as upstream ore deliveries dry up
flavor_texts: The fabrication lines idle. Without ore, even the foundries go quiet.
Stockpiles are running low. The swing shift foreman stares at empty cargo bays.

event_chains.description: Labor strike cascades to downstream manufacturing shortage
